race.comment: WRITTEN BY LUCY (3) followed up a strong first-up effort with a gutsy all-the-way win over today's distance at Nowra last start. Won't find this any harder and with further improvement likely at this stage of the prep another win looks on the cards. BROGANS CREEK (5) has been narrowly defeated at both runs this time in work, the latest just seven days ago when a photo went against him in a BM50 over this distance at Wellington. Perfectly drawn to add to his sound record here at this trip. BRIEF STATEMENT (1) overcame early interference to be beaten just a neck in a similar race here 26 days ago. Big chance with another effort like that. THE MOOCH (13) raced at Wellington over this distance last Friday when he caught the eye late to finish just behind the placegetters. Has been in the money at six of seven runs at Orange which brings him right under notice. LA PELAGO (9) finds a suitable race today and from gate one can play a role in the outcome.
